entry.title: Exact Match
entry.content:
[!NOTE] Definition
Assume a database with a set of tuples; each tuple consists of a unique fixed-length key together with some state information. A query specifies a key K. The goal is to return the state information associated with the tuple whose key is K.

routers = interconnect devices

Why do we learn Exact Match?

  • In the context of networking
    • We measure the speed in terms of memory accesses, instead of processing
    • We have a strict deadline (under 10 ns)
  • Crucial for bridging, which is often integrated within a router

Bridging

  • 3 challenges: Ethernet, Wire Speed Forwarding, and Scaling Lookups to Higher Speeds
    • 802.1 spanning tree bridges

Challenge 1: Ethernet under fire

  • Problems: poor performance at large loads (retransmission) and long distance
  • Routers interconnect links using information in the routing header, while repeaters interconnect links based on physical-layer information, such as bits.
  • Bridge (Data Link Layer Relay)
    • based only on the data link layer
    • Packet Repeater
      • Buffers packet, even for packets that don’t cross different Ethernets
    • Filtered Repeater
      • has a table that maps station addresses to Ethernets (A and B are in the same network)
      • Define p: fraction of traffic on each Ethernet is to destinations on the same Ethernet. Then the overall bandwidth of the two Ethernet systems becomes (1 + p) times the bandwidth of a single Ethernet.
      • This follows because the fraction p can be simultaneously sent on both Ethernets, increasing overall bandwidth by this fraction. Hence both bandwidth and distance increase.
    • Filtering Repeater With Learning

challenge 2: wire speed forwarding

  • If the bridge takes more time to forward a packet than the minimum packet arrival time, there are always scenarios in which packets to be forwarded will be dropped because the buffers are filled with packets that will be discarded.
  • The solution: the bridge would look up the destination address in the table (for forwarding) and the source address (for learning) in the time it took a minimum-size packet to arrive on an Ethernet
    • 64-byte minimum packet: 51.2 microsecond to forward a packet.
    • Two-port bridge could receive a minimum-size packet on each of its Ethernets every 51.2 microsecond: two lookups (destination and source) every 25.6 microsecond.
    • The new design will process each packet, determining whether or not to discard the packet
    • use binary search lookups

Challenge 3: scaling lookups to higher speeds

  • Bridge database size increases to 64K. Binary search lookups don’t suffice
  • Gigaswitch: hashing-based lookups. Each bridge lookup makes at most four reads from memory.

Perfect Hashing

  • hashing
    • key: ethernet address
    • value: port number?
  • A hashed address is obtained by the equation A(X) ∗ M(X) mod G(X)
    • A(X): address expressed as a 47-degree polynomial
    • M(X): nonzero, 47-degree programmable hash multiplier
    • G(X): irreducible polynomial X48+X36+X25+X10+1X^{48} + X^{36} + X^{25} + X^{10} + 1X48+X36+X25+X10+1
  • Hashed Address
    • 48-bit: size of Ethernet address
    • [15:0]: index into a 64K-entry hash table
    • Each entry points to a balanced binary tree of height at most 3
    • [47:16]: distinguish collided keys
      • The binary tree is sorted based on these values
    • at most 4 memory accesses: 1 for hash table lookup, 3 for the height-3 tree
  • CAM (Content Addressable Memory): a small hardware lookup database. Aimed to deal with 7 conflicts (size of the heigh-3 complete binary tree)

Using hardware parallelism

  • pipeline binary search
  • logarithmic number of processing stages, each with its own memory array
    • Each level of the binary tree has its own stage
  • Search keys enter from the left and progress from stage to stage, carrying a pointer (points to a “child” key) that identifies which key in the corresponding stage memory must be compared to the search key.
  • The lookup throughput is nearly one per memory access
  • still log⁡2n\log_{2}nlog2​n lookups in total, but the throughput is improved

d-left

  • when n objects are hashed into n buckets, the expectation of this maximum is (1+o(1))log⁡nlog⁡log⁡n\frac{(1 + o(1))\log n}{\log\log n}loglogn(1+o(1))logn​ (high probability) when a random hash function is used
  • Goal: reduce this maximum to a small number (say 2 or 3) so that every bucket can fit into a memory block
  • d-random
    • use d > 1 random hash functions (h1, h2, ···, hd) instead of 1. Given a hash key x, there are d candidate hash buckets into which x can be inserted: buckets indexed by h1(x), h2(x), ···, hd(x) respectively.
      • x is inserted into the bucket that is least occupied
    • The expectation of the maximum value is (log⁡log⁡nlog⁡d)+O(1)\left( \frac{\log \log n}{\log d} \right) + O(1)(logdloglogn​)+O(1)
  • d-left
    • variation of d-random
    • Hash table is partitioned into logically independent subsets of size nd\frac{n}{d}dn​. d-random doesn’t have such partition
    • if there are more than one least occupied buckets among the d buckets where an object x should be inserted into, then x will be inserted into the leftmost one among them

entry.title: career fair
entry.content:
All Companies

  • [ ] 412th Test Engineering Group：美军测试工程团队，专注于军事设备测试。
  • [ ] AFCS Robins Air Force Base：空军平民服务系统，位于罗宾斯空军基地。
  • [ ] Aflac：美国知名的保险公司，提供意外和健康保险。
  • [ ] Air Liquide：全球领先的气体供应商，服务于工业和医疗行业。
  • [ ] Akuna Capital：技术驱动的交易公司，专注于算法交易和市场流动性。
  • [ ] Albemarle Corporation：全球领先的特种化学品制造商，涉及锂、催化剂等产品。
  • [ ] Alcon：全球眼科医疗设备公司，专注于眼科手术和护理产品。
  • [ ] Alex Lee, Inc.：零售和食品配送公司，主要为超市提供服务。
  • [ ] ALL4：环境咨询公司，提供空气质量、废水等环境合规服务。
  • [ ] Allison-Smith Company LLC：提供电气承包和工程服务的公司。
  • [ ] Alpek Polyester USA：主要生产聚酯纤维和塑料的公司。
  • [ ] Alvarez & Marsal：全球管理咨询公司，专注于企业重组和运营改进。
  • [ ] Ameresco：能源服务公司，专注于可再生能源和节能项目。
  • [ ] American Credit Acceptance：为消费者提供汽车贷款服务的金融公司。
  • [ ] Americold Logistics：全球领先的冷链物流公司。
  • [ ] AMI：医疗器械制造商，专注于植入式医疗设备。
  • [ ] Analog Devices Inc.：全球领先的半导体公司，专注于模拟和数字信号处理技术。
  • [ ] Apollo Mission Critical Engineering：为关键任务提供工程解决方案的公司。
  • [ ] ASM：半导体设备制造商，专注于原子层沉积技术。
  • [ ] Axis Infrastructure：基础设施建设与管理公司，涉及交通、能源等领域。
  • [ ] Barr Engineering Co.：提供环境、能源和水资源管理咨询服务的公司。
  • [ ] Bernhard：能源服务公司，专注于建筑能效管理。
  • [ ] Black & Veatch：全球工程公司，专注于能源、水务和通信基础设施。
  • [ ] Bose Corporation：知名的音响设备制造商，以高质量音频产品著称。
  • [ ] bp：全球能源公司，主要从事石油和天然气的勘探、生产和销售。
  • [ ] BRPH Companies：提供设计和建筑服务的公司，涉及航空航天、教育等领域。
  • [ ] C3 AI：提供企业级AI解决方案的公司，专注于大数据分析和机器学习。
  • [ ] CareSource：医疗保险公司，主要提供Medicaid和Medicare计划。
  • [ ] Caterpillar Inc.：全球最大的工程机械和矿山设备制造商之一。
  • [ ] CB&I：提供能源基础设施建设服务的公司，涉及石油、天然气等领域。
  • [ ] Celanese：全球特种化学品公司，产品涉及塑料、化工材料等。
  • [ ] Chevron Corporation：全球领先的能源公司，涉及石油、天然气的开发与销售。
  • [ ] CM Mission Critical Engineering：为关键任务提供工程和咨询服务。
  • [ ] Colonial Pipeline：运营全美最大的成品油管道网络。
  • [ ] Cox Enterprises：多元化企业，涉及通信、媒体和汽车服务等领域。
  • [ ] CRANE Currency：生产高安全性纸币的公司，服务全球各大央行。
  • [ ] CRB：设计和建筑公司，专注于生物技术、食品和制药行业。
  • [ ] Cretex Medical：生产医疗设备的公司，专注于植入式和外科设备。
  • [ ] D.R. Horton：美国最大的住宅建筑公司之一。
  • [ ] Defense Intelligence Agency：美国国防部的情报机构，提供军事情报分析。
  • [ ] Delta Air Lines, Inc.：全球领先的航空公司之一。
  • [ ] Duracell：全球知名的电池制造商。
  • [ ] Enercon Services, Inc.：能源和环境咨询公司。
  • [ ] EPRI：电力研究所，专注于电力行业技术和标准的研发。
  • [ ] Equifax：全球领先的信用报告和数据分析公司。
  • [ ] Evonik：特种化学品公司，产品涉及日化、医疗、农业等行业。
  • [ ] Exotec：机器人技术公司，专注于自动化仓储和物流解决方案。
  • [ ] Factory Automation Systems, Inc.：提供工厂自动化解决方案的公司。
  • [ ] Federal Aviation Administration：美国联邦航空管理局，负责监管航空安全。
  • [ ] Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation：美国联邦存款保险公司，保障银行存款安全。
  • [ ] FM GLOBAL：全球领先的商业和工业财产保险公司，专注于风险管理和防灾技术。
  • [ ] FORTNA：供应链优化公司，提供设计和实施智能物流解决方案。
  • [ ] Freudenberg：全球技术集团，提供密封件、滤材、表面处理等高科技产品。
  • [ ] Freudenberg-NOK：Freudenberg集团旗下的子公司，专注于生产密封技术。
  • [ ] FTI Consulting：全球商业咨询公司，提供法律、金融和战略咨询服务。
  • [ ] GDS Associates, Inc.：能源咨询公司，专注于电力和能源市场的技术和管理服务。
  • [ ] GE Healthcare：全球医疗技术公司，提供医疗设备和数字化医疗解决方案。
  • [ ] GE Vernova：GE旗下的能源子公司，专注于可再生能源和数字化电网解决方案。
  • [ ] Genuine Parts Company：全球分销商，提供汽车零部件、工业设备等产品。
  • [ ] Georgia System Operations Corporation：提供电网管理和能源控制服务的公司。
  • [ ] Georgia-Pacific：全球最大的纸制品和建筑材料公司之一。
  • [ ] Geotab：全球领先的车队管理和物联网解决方案供应商。
  • [ ] Gerdau：全球钢铁公司，专注于长材生产和金属回收。
  • [ ] GPD Group：提供工程设计和建筑咨询服务，涉及公共和私营部门项目。
  • [ ] Graphic Packaging International, Inc.：全球包装解决方案供应商，专注于纸板包装。
  • [ ] Great Dane Trailers：美国知名拖车和半挂车制造商。
  • [ ] Greater Fort Lauderdale Alliance：促进佛罗里达州劳德代尔堡地区经济发展的机构。
  • [ ] HD Supply：一家工业分销公司，专注于维护、维修和运营产品的分销。
  • [ ] HDR：全球设计、建筑和工程公司，涉及水务、能源、交通等多个领域。
  • [ ] Heidelberg Materials：全球领先的建筑材料公司，专注于水泥、骨料和混凝土生产。
  • [ ] Honda：全球知名汽车和摩托车制造商，也涉足机器人和能源技术领域。
  • [ ] Huntsman：全球化工公司，生产一系列特种化学品，用于不同的工业领域。
  • [ ] Ingersoll Rand：提供压缩机、泵和流体管理设备的全球制造商。
  • [ ] Jim Ellis Automotive Group：亚特兰大地区的汽车经销商，提供多个品牌的汽车销售和服务。
  • [ ] Johnson & Johnson：全球医疗和消费品巨头，专注于制药、医疗设备和健康产品。
  • [ ] Kajima Building & Design Group, Inc.：建筑设计和建设公司，专注于商业和工业项目。
  • [ ] Kia：全球知名汽车制造商，提供各种车型及电动汽车技术。
  • [ ] Kimberly Clark：全球领先的卫生用品公司，旗下品牌包括舒洁、好奇等。
  • [ ] KLA：半导体设备供应商，专注于半导体制造过程中的检测和计量。
  • [ ] LOCKHEED MARTIN：全球领先的航空航天和国防公司，专注于研发先进技术。
  • [ ] Mars, Inc.：全球食品和宠物护理公司，旗下拥有众多知名品牌，如玛氏、宝路。
  • [ ] Martin/Martin：工程咨询公司，提供土木、结构工程服务。
  • [ ] McKenney’s Inc.：提供机械和电气系统的设计、施工和维护服务的公司。
  • [ ] Merck & Co., Inc.：全球领先的制药公司，专注于药物研发和疫苗制造。
  • [ ] Micron Technology：存储和半导体解决方案的全球领导者。
  • [ ] Milwaukee Tool：专业电动工具、手动工具和配件的知名制造商。
  • [ ] Mobile Communications America：为企业提供通信解决方案，专注于无线通信技术。
  • [ ] Mohawk Industries：全球最大的地板制造商之一，产品涉及地毯、瓷砖、木材等。
  • [ ] Monolith：一家碳黑生产企业，采用清洁能源技术生产碳基材料。
  • [ ] Murata Electronics：全球电子元器件制造商，专注于被动元件、传感器和通信模块。
  • [ ] Nagarro：全球IT咨询公司，提供软件开发、数字化转型等技术服务。
  • [ ] National Air and Space Intelligence Center (NASIC)：美国空军的情报部门，专注于空天领域的威胁评估。
  • [ ] Naval Air Warfare Center, Weapons Division：美国海军航空武器研发和测试中心。
  • [ ] NCR Atleos & NCR Voyix：全球支付、零售和技术解决方案提供商。
  • [ ] Neptune Technology Group Inc.：水资源管理和计量技术的全球供应商。
  • [ ] Nexus Technologies, Inc.：提供能源、通信和自动化解决方案的工程公司。
  • [ ] NIWC Atlantic：美国海军信息战中心，专注于网络和信息技术。
  • [ ] NORFOLK NAVAL SHIPYARD：美国海军最大的造船厂之一，负责维护和修理舰艇。
  • [ ] Norfolk Southern：美国铁路运输公司，提供货运和物流服务。
  • [ ] NSWC Carderock Division：美国海军水面战中心，专注于舰船设计和工程研究。
  • [ ] Nutrien：全球农业公司，提供肥料和农业服务，致力于提升全球农业生产力。
  • [ ] Origami Risk：提供保险行业的软件解决方案，专注于风险管理平台。
  • [ ] Packaging Corporation of America：美国领先的纸板和包装制造商。
  • [ ] Parker Hannifin Corporation：全球领先的运动和控制技术供应商，产品覆盖多个行业。
  • [ ] Paulson-Cheek Mechanical, Inc.：提供暖通空调和管道安装服务的机械承包公司。
  • [ ] PBF Energy Chalmette Refining：美国能源公司，专注于石油炼制和生产。
  • [ ] PepsiCo：全球饮料和食品公司，旗下拥有百事可乐、乐事等品牌。
  • [ ] Phillips 66：能源公司，专注于炼油、化工和物流业务。
  • [ ] Procter & Gamble：全球日用消费品公司，产品涉及个人护理、家庭清洁等领域。
  • [ ] Protiviti：全球咨询公司，提供风险管理、技术咨询和内部审计服务。
  • [ ] RaceTrac：美国东南部的连锁加油站和便利店运营商。
  • [ ] Redwire Space：航空航天技术公司，专注于太空探索和卫星技术。
  • [ ] Rincon Research Corporation：提供信号处理和数据分析解决方案的技术公司。
  • [ ] Rockwell Automation：工业自动化和信息技术公司，专注于数字化转型。
  • [ ] Sage UK Limited：全球商业管理软件提供商，产品覆盖会计、支付和工资管理等领域。
  • [ ] Samsung Austin Semiconductor：三星电子在美国的半导体制造基地，生产内存和处理器芯片。
  • [ ] Sargent & Lundy：提供能源和基础设施工程设计服务的公司。
  • [ ] Savannah River Mission Completion：美国能源部的清洁能源和环境管理项目。
  • [ ] Shimizu North America, LLC.：日本知名建筑公司清水建设的北美子公司，专注于大型建筑项目。
  • [ ] SK On：韩国SK集团旗下的电池制造商，专注于电动汽车电池研发。
  • [ ] SLB：全球领先的油田服务公司，专注于石油、天然气领域的技术和设备。
  • [ ] SSOE：全球工程、采购和建筑管理服务公司。
  • [ ] STP Nuclear Operating Company：核电运营公司，负责德克萨斯州核电站的运营和维护。
  • [ ] Stream Realty：商业房地产公司，提供房地产开发、租赁和投资管理服务。
  • [ ] Stryten Energy：提供储能解决方案的公司，专注于电动汽车和可再生能源领域。
  • [ ] Terma Inc.：提供防务、航空航天和安全系统的公司。
  • [ ] Texas Instruments (TI)：全球知名半导体制造商，产品涵盖模拟和数字信号处理芯片。
  • [ ] The Cigna Group：全球健康服务公司，提供健康保险和相关服务。
  • [ ] The Clorox Company：全球消费品公司，旗下拥有高乐氏等多个知名品牌。
  • [ ] The Mosaic Company：全球领先的农业化肥公司，专注于钾肥和磷肥的生产。
  • [ ] The Shpigler Group：提供战略咨询服务，专注于公共和私营部门的运营优化。
  • [ ] Ulteig Engineers：提供电力、运输和水资源管理的工程设计和咨询服务。

Curated List

My name is Xinyu. I’m a senior student majoring in Computer Science and graduating in Spring 2025. I have experience in Data, Full-stack development, and Computing Systems. I’m looking for a full time job and also interested in an internship next summer.

Akuna Capital (D18)

Akuna Capital is a trading firm that specializes in low-latency technologies, algorithmic trading, and market-making in derivatives and digital assets​
✔Interests
✔Positions
✔Interview?
✔Question for me?
✔Why do you choose XX? What excites you the most in XXX?
✔What’s your day-to-day responsibility at XXX?
✔Check my website
✔Is it easy to explore and learn new technologies in … ?
✔Any interesting projects going on in XXX?

Trading & Data & Systems & Hardware
Software Engineer Intern (Python, C++)

  • Pursuing a BS/MS/ PhD in Computer Science, Engineering, Math, Physics or related field
  • Experience programming in C++
  • Experience with several of the following – distributed systems, networking, data structures & algorithms, and operating systems
  • Exposure to scripting and rudimentary data mining and regression analysis, ideally in Python with Pandas and Numpy
  • Strong analytic and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to communicate with the trading team, obtain requirements, find solutions and implement them in a clean and concise way
  • Passion for innovation and building systems from the ground up
  • Ability to adapt to an ever-changing environment
  • Self-starter attitude with the ability to work independently
  • Strong sense of ownership
  • Must be graduating by August 2026 or prior
    Junior Trader
    Hardware Engineer Intern
  • Pursuing a BS/MS/PhD in Computer and Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field
  • Knowledge of digital logic circuit design, preferably using Verilog, System Verilog, or VHDL
  • Strong analytic and problem-solving skills
  • Can create an easily understood and testable design that can change as quickly as the market does
  • Passion for innovation and building systems from the ground up
  • Ability to adapt to an ever-changing environment
  • Graduating in May 2027 or prior

C3 AI (F3)

C3 AI is a software company that delivers enterprise AI solutions for data-driven decision-making across various industries
Solution Engineer?
Software Engineer Intern

  • Pursuing a Bachelor of Science or Master of Science in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related fields.
  • Experience with JavaScript, Java, or other object-oriented programming language.- Strong hands-on experience and understanding of object-oriented programming, data structures, algorithms, profiling & optimization
  • Real passion for developing team-oriented solutions to complex engineering problems.
  • Thrive in an autonomous, empowering and exciting environment.- Great verbal and written communication skills to collaborate multi-functionally and improve scalability.- Interest in committing to a fun, friendly, expansive, and intellectually stimulating environment.
    Data Science Intern
  • Completed or pursuing MS or PhD in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Statistics, or equivalent field- Applied Machine Learning experience (regression and classification, supervised, and unsupervised learning)- Experience with prototyping languages such as Python and R- Strong mathematical background (linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics)- Experience with scalable ML (MapReduce, streaming)- Ability to drive a project and work both independently and in a team- Smart, motivated, can-do attitude, and seeks to make a difference- Proficient in spoken and written English

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with JavaScript and Java
  • Experience with time series and dynamical system- A portfolio of projects (GitHub, papers, etc.)

Lockheed Martin (A4)

Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace and defense company that develops advanced technologies for security, systems engineering, and network security

Micron Technology (G17)

Micron Technology is a leader in memory and storage solutions, developing innovative semiconductor technology for computing, networking, and embedded systems​
System Software Engineer Intern
Entry Level jobs?

Texas Instruments (TI) (F23)

Texas Instruments (TI) is a semiconductor company that focuses on embedded systems and digital signal processing, providing essential components for electronics and technology​

KLA (G8)

KLA is a technology company that specializes in data analytics and AI for semiconductor manufacturing and process control
Applications Engineering Intern

  • Creative thinker with good problem-solving abilities- Working with large data sets- Excellent proficiency of data analysis techniques in Excel or other plotting S/Ws such as JMP or Origin- Proficiency in Python, and/or MATLAB applications- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills- Motivated to learn new skills independently.

FORTNA (E14)

FORTNA is a logistics and automation company that provides intelligent supply chain solutions through system optimization and software development

Rockwell Automation (C16)

Rockwell Automation is an industrial automation company that drives digital transformation through IoT and system integration for manufacturing and production systems
Hardware Engineer Co-op

Work on an agile team to develop test requirements and execute hardware verification test plans with traceability to product requirements, including board level functional testing, EMC/EMI, Safety Agencies (UL, ATEX, IECEX), Functional Safety (IEC 61508), and Environmental- Perform programming, analysis, and troubleshooting of electronic hardware prototype- Contribute to associated product design documentation and test reports- Take ownership of assignments by understanding expected output, requesting help as needed, and helping teammates as needed- Build relationships with technical leads and peers to grow your knowledge of the product development lifecycle

GE Vernova (A10, A11, A12)

GE Vernova is an energy technology company focused on digital solutions for optimizing energy systems and renewable energy infrastructure

Samsung Austin Semiconductor (C23)

Samsung Austin Semiconductor is a semiconductor manufacturing company that develops cutting-edge chips and embedded systems for various applications

NCR Atleos (H1) & NCR Voyix (H2)

NCR Atleos & NCR Voyix are fintech companies that provide cloud-based payment and IoT solutions for retail and finance sectors​
Full-time opportunity?

Nagarro (D7)

Nagarro is an IT consulting company that offers custom software development and digital transformation services for businesses across industries​

Equifax (E12)

Equifax is a global data analytics and credit reporting company that focuses on data security and privacy in financial services

Geotab (F7)

Geotab is an IoT company that provides fleet management solutions through data analytics and system optimization
Software Engineer

  • 2+ years of experience in software development with a solid understanding of object-oriented design, and multithreaded programming (Preferrably experience with C# and .NET Framework).- Understanding of database design and query optimization and experience with relational databases (Perferrably experience with PostgreSQL).- Experience with front-end languages and libraries (e.g. HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Typescript) and JavaScript frameworks (e.g. React)- Experience with RESTful API design and development.- Working knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes.- Knowledge of software development best practices, including version control (Git), testing, and code reviews.- Post-secondary Diploma/Degree specialization in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

Origami Risk (F8)

Origami Risk is a software company that develops risk management platforms with a focus on IT-driven solutions for enterprises
Software Engineering Intern

  • Working towards a bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science or related technical discipline is required- Experience with c++, c# or java is required- Strong communication skills, intelligence, and drive; must be able to work in a self-driven manner within a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment- Ability to quickly learn and apply new technologies

Procter & Gamble (G11, G12)

Procter & Gamble (P&G) is a consumer goods company that integrates IT infrastructure and data analytics to optimize operations and product development
IT Analytics and Insights (2025 Grads)

  • You are graduating in the Spring or Summer of 2025- We look for candidates with strong academic results with a BS or MS in MIS, Computer Science, Industrial or Computer/Systems Engineering, Information Security, Applied Math, Statistics, Operations Research, Analytics, (or like degrees) and MBA’s with a technical undergraduate degree or background.- Proven use of technology to add business value- Adept at using Analytics technologies and tools for solving ad hoc business problems, innovating on potential future solutions, and working with technology to translate your innovations into robust, scaled, analytic solutions and actionable insights- Excellent written and verbal communication skills to influence others to act- Possess strong thinking/problem-solving skills which can be applied to business processes with a “can-do” attitude- Proven capability to handle multiple priorities​

Protiviti (E9)

Protiviti is a consulting company that specializes in IT consulting, risk management, and technology solutions for businesses
Atlanta Technology Consulting Intern
Qualifications

  • Degree: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant discipline (e.g., Computer Science, Data Science, Decision Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Information Technology, Internet of Things, Applied Math, Machine Learning, Quantum, or other technology majors)- Visa Status: All applicants applying for U.S. job openings need authorization to work in the United States for Protiviti without sponsorship now or in the future- Graduation Status: Must be within one year of final graduation at the time of internship- Technical Skills Desired of an entry-level Technology Consulting Consultant:- Advanced verbal and written communication skills.- Ability to apply critical thinking skills and innovation to client engagements across various industries- Specific skills below prepare you better for specific Technology Consulting segments:

  • Demonstrated ability and desire to research and analyze pertinent client, industry, and technical matters- Basic experience with any of the major Business Intelligence reporting tools, such as Power BI, BusinessObjects, Hyperion, Cognos, Microstrategy, Tableau, QlikView, or SSRS- Entry-level experience with domain management strategies, network segmentation, firewalls, and middleware tools- Introductory knowledge of internal control frameworks or knowledge of IT controls, with particular experience to understand IT and Business risks related to SAP- Basic experience working within a Microsoft SQL Server, MySQL, Oracle, TeraData, or other major database management systems- Familiarity of technology project risks and strategies for managing and mitigating- Programming skills such as Python, Java, JavaScript, etc. are preferred- Basic Knowledge of security-related topics such as authentication, entitlements, identity management, data protection, data leakage prevention, validation checking, encryption, hashing, principle of least privilege, software attack methods, and data storage- Fundamental knowledge of process reengineering and methodologies, including flowcharting and technical design documentation- Ability to convey complex technical security concepts to technical and non-technical audiences

The Cigna Group (F10)

The Cigna Group is a global health services company that leverages data analytics and IT to provide digital health solutions​

The Clorox Company (E1)

The Clorox Company is a consumer goods company that uses data management and IT to drive digital transformation in operations​

Valero (B15)

Valero is an energy company that focuses on digital transformation and IT-driven optimizations in the energy sector​

WestRock (C8)

WestRock is a packaging company that optimizes production and supply chain management through IT and digital transformation initiatives​

WSP in the U.S. (B2)

WSP in the U.S. is an engineering consulting firm that integrates smart infrastructure solutions and IoT for urban development projects

entry.title: Verilog Basics
entry.content:
If you’re new to digital design and want to explore the world of hardware description languages (HDL), Verilog is an excellent place to start. Verilog is widely used in the design and verification of digital circuits, and learning it can open the door to exciting opportunities in fields like ASIC design, FPGA development, and embedded systems. In this post, we’ll take you through the basics of Verilog, helping you build a strong foundation to start your journey.

What is Verilog?

Verilog is a hardware description language used to model electronic systems. Unlike traditional programming languages like C or Python, Verilog is specifically designed for describing the behavior and structure of digital circuits. Whether you’re working on a small digital circuit or a complex system-on-chip (SoC), Verilog allows you to simulate, verify, and eventually synthesize your design into actual hardware.

Why Learn Verilog?

Verilog is a powerful tool for digital designers, enabling you to:

  • Design and simulate digital circuits: Before physically building a circuit, you can simulate its behavior using Verilog to ensure it works as expected.
  • Work with FPGAs and ASICs: Verilog is commonly used in designing hardware that runs on FPGAs and ASICs, which are crucial in industries ranging from consumer electronics to aerospace.
  • Improve career prospects: Knowledge of Verilog is highly valued in industries related to hardware design, making it a great skill to have on your resume.

Prerequisites

Before diving into Verilog, it’s helpful to have a basic understanding of:

  • Digital logic: Concepts like logic gates, combinational logic, and sequential logic are fundamental to understanding how to design circuits in Verilog.
  • Basic programming concepts: Although Verilog is not a traditional programming language, familiarity with concepts like variables, conditional statements, and loops can make learning Verilog easier.

Basic Verilog Syntax

Let’s start with the basics of Verilog syntax:

Modules

In Verilog, the design is broken down into modules, which are the building blocks of a Verilog program. Each module represents a specific function or a part of the circuit. Here’s an example of a simple module:

In this example, and_gate is a module that implements a simple AND gate. It has two inputs (a and b) and one output (y). The assign statement is used to define the logic.

Data Types

Verilog provides several data types for representing signals:

  • wire: Represents a physical connection between components.
  • reg: Used to store values and is typically used in sequential logic.

Ports

Ports are the inputs and outputs of a module. They are defined inside the module definition using keywords like input, output, and inout.

Writing Your First Verilog Program

Let’s write a simple Verilog program that implements an AND gate:

This code describes a basic AND gate with two inputs and one output. The assign statement continuously drives the output y based on the AND operation of inputs a and b.

Simulating the Design

To verify that your Verilog code works correctly, you can simulate it using a Verilog simulator such as ModelSim or Icarus Verilog. Here’s a simple testbench to simulate our AND gate:

In this testbench, we simulate different input combinations for the AND gate and observe the output. The #10 is a time delay, allowing us to simulate the passage of time in the digital circuit.

Combinational and Sequential Logic

Combinational Logic

Combinational logic is logic where the output is a direct function of the current inputs, without any memory of previous inputs. In Verilog, combinational logic is often implemented using assign statements:

Sequential Logic

Sequential logic, on the other hand, depends on both current inputs and past states. This type of logic requires memory elements like flip-flops, which are described using always blocks:

This code represents a simple D flip-flop, where the output q changes on the rising edge of the clock signal (clk).

Best Practices in Verilog Coding

As you start coding in Verilog, keep the following best practices in mind:

  • Modularity: Break down your design into smaller modules that are easy to understand and debug.
  • Clear naming conventions: Use descriptive names for signals and modules to make your code more readable.
  • Comment your code: Add comments to explain your design logic and important parts of your code.
  • Test thoroughly: Always simulate your design under various conditions to ensure correctness before synthesis.

Resources for Further Learning

Here are some resources to help you continue your Verilog learning journey:

  • Books: “Verilog HDL” by Samir Palnitkar is an excellent book for beginners.
  • Online Courses: Websites like Coursera and edX offer comprehensive courses on digital design and Verilog.
  • Communities: Engage with online communities like Stack Overflow or the Verilog subreddit to get help and share knowledge.

Conclusion

Learning Verilog is a valuable skill that can help you design and verify digital circuits effectively. By understanding the basics, practicing with simple designs, and following best practices, you’ll be well on your way to mastering this powerful hardware description language. So start coding, simulate your designs, and have fun exploring the world of digital logic!

Happy coding!

This blog post should give beginners a solid starting point to learn Verilog and understand its core concepts. Feel free to adjust or expand on any sections to suit your audience’s needs!
